content: Recent market action in 2024 has shown classic support/resistance dynamics in major indices. The S&P 500 found repeated support at the 4,800 level in Q1 2024, with institutional buying evident at that zone. Resistance at 5,200 was tested multiple times before breaking on strong earnings. Crypto markets showed Bitcoin respecting the $60,000 support level established in early 2024. Technical analysts note that round number levels continue to attract significant order flow despite algorithmic trading prevalence.
